label: Eufy Security
description: Eufy Security cloud account and camera discovery via pyeufysecurity

account_fields.label: Country code
account_fields.help_text: Two-letter ISO country code of the Eufy account, e.g. DE, AT or CH.

account_fields.label: Eufy verification code (one-time)
account_fields.help_text: Leave empty to request a code. This field is cleared automatically after successful verification.

account_fields.label: Local RTSP username (optional)
account_fields.help_text: Only needed to take over cameras with NAS/RTSP enabled in the Eufy app as a permanent stream.
